# Endoscopy Product Card Template

## Purpose

Defines the ideal CyberMedica card for endoscopes, video systems and related
endoscopy devices.

## Required Sections

- Identity: manufacturer, model, article/SKU, registration number, status.
- Classification: scope type, single-use/reusable, specialty.
- Documents: RU, IFU, datasheet, reprocessing instructions when applicable.
- Physical characteristics: diameter, working length, channel, field of view.
- Imaging: resolution, light source, compatible processors/monitors.
- Compatibility: processors, monitors, accessories, valves, displays.
- Sterility/reprocessing: single-use, sterile status, cleaning, disinfection.
- Warnings/contraindications: IFU-backed only.
- Procurement notes: article numbers and compatible systems.
- Evidence: source documents and locators.

## Critical Fields

- single-use/reusable status;
- sterility;
- dimensions;
- processor/display compatibility;
- intended use;
- reprocessing requirements.

## Safety

Never publish compatibility or sterility from marketing copy. IFU is required.
